reviews.author: Gia Thanh Dang
reviews.text: Ao Ba Om in Tra Vinh is a beautiful and peaceful destination that truly reflects the cultural identity of the region. The lake has an almost square shape, surrounded by a forest of ancient hopea and dipterocarp trees that are hundreds of years old. Their massive roots rise above the ground, creating a very distinctive and impressive landscape. The atmosphere is cool, quiet, and relaxing, making it a perfect place to walk around and enjoy nature. According to Khmer folklore, long ago men and women argued over who should take the initiative in marriage proposals. To settle the dispute, they held a contest to dig a pond overnight. Ba Om, representing the women, cleverly hung lanterns high in the trees, making the men believe that dawn had arrived. Thinking they had lost, the men gave up. The women won the contest, and from then on, it became customary for the groom’s family to formally propose. The pond dug by the women was named Ao Ba Om. Today, Ao Ba Om is considered a tourism symbol of Tra Vinh and is definitely worth visiting for both its natural beauty and cultural significance.

reviews.author: Sepp Lengauer
reviews.text: I visit here 2 or 3 times each year. Just love the Tranquility, Peacefulness, Relaxing around the Lake, the Pagoda and the general Atmosphere. On Holidays, and yes include Khmer Holidays as well it becomes rather busy, but at other times its just so peaceful. If you in the area, take an hour or 2 and recharge.

reviews.author: FrancisP
reviews.text: A nice attraction in Tra Vinh city. This place is beautiful with many old trees in beautiful shape.

reviews.author: JEWEL TOURS Dinh Thanh
reviews.text: Good place to know More about kherme culture, history in the South if Vietnam

reviews.author: Hung Ngo
reviews.text: Best place to enjoy nature and learn about history of Tra Vinh.

reviews.author: Ho Ngoc Tin
reviews.text: The pond with many big trees around it. Ok om bok festival will be held here every Nov.

reviews.author: Phung Nguyen
reviews.text: Nice view to relax and enjoy the nature.

reviews.author: Richard Tan
reviews.text: Very relaxed chill place. You can rest under the tress and have a sugar cane drink or have one of Tra Vinh's popular dish Bún Nước Lèo.

reviews.author: Vinh Nguyễn
reviews.text: Fresh air made by the huge trees around big lake between. A Thousand scenes for taking photo.

reviews.author: Lluis Fandos
reviews.text: Very nice place to visit with family and friends. A quiet pond surrounded by trees. Enjoy nature in Tra Vinh.

reviews.author: Tony Pham (Mr.Nobody)
reviews.text: So many trees here, a beautiful place for taking nice pictures

reviews.author: Thành Quang
reviews.text: Good place for find myself! Nature, silent!

reviews.author: Yen Thu Pham
reviews.text: Hồ sen to đùng, cây cổ thụ xung quanh mát cực. Chỗ này người ta cũng nuôi khá nhiều cá, ngồi ngắm cảnh chill chill cũng thú vị.
